title: Dashboard is crashing while scrolling
excerpt:
I have 26+ charts in my dashboard when I am scrolling down and up it is crashing every time. 
can you please give me idea why it is happening. monday board has limitation of how much charts in a dashboard?

posts.author: Rajeev_msquare (Rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have 26+ charts in my dashboard when I am scrolling down and up it is crashing every time.
can you please give me idea why it is happening. monday board has limitation of how much charts in a dashboard?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Rajeev_msquare - this doesn’t sound right Can this behaviour be replicated in an incognito window? If so, can you instead try duplicating the dashboard and letting us know if this changes anything?
